# GLM


```{r include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(tidylog)
library(RCurl)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(janitor)
library(sf)
library(chron)
library(lattice)
library(mapplots)
library(qwraps2) 
library(spict)
```


```{r}
#| include: false
source("my_themes.R")
```


```{r}
#| include: false
blue <- "#1E90FF"   # HCR1
orange <- "#FF8C00" # HCR2
Cyan <- "#00CED1"  # HCR3
purple <- "#8A2BE2" # HCR4
red <- "#DC143C"    # HCR5
teal <- "#20B2AA"   # HCR6
```


## About traditional models 

this is good to know 

:::: columns


::: {.column width="50%"}

- this is one 
- this is two 
- and three here

:::

::: {.column width="50%"}


```{r, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
plot(cars)
```

:::

::::
